ar.anonymous_help: Your name is hidden from the triage team's listing. Coordinators may still see it for safety reviews.
ar.field_sentiment: How does this make you feel?
ar.intro_body: Send a question, suggest an idea, report an issue, or share how you're feeling about life in our community. Your municipality coordinators read every submission.
ar.my_submissions_empty: You haven't sent any feedback yet.
ar.public_help: Your message body may appear in anonymous summaries shown to the community. Your identity is never displayed.
ar.submit_error: We couldn't send your feedback. Please check the form and try again.
ar.submit_success: Thank you — your feedback has been received.
